zh.lifeSummary: 當Margery Foliot於大約1313年出生在英國諾圖波藍德米特福德時，她的父親Richard Foliot 2nd Lord Foliot30歲，母親Joan de Braose32歲。她於1327年5月18日與Hugh Hastings結婚。他們至少是3個兒子和4個女兒的父母。她去世於1349年8月8日在英國英格蘭越可爾多卡斯特享年37歲，埋葬在英國越可爾多卡斯特。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Margery Foliot于大约1313年出生在英国諾圖波藍德米特福德时，她的父亲Richard Foliot 2nd Lord Foliot30岁，母亲Joan de Braose32岁。她于1327年5月18日与Hugh Hastings结婚。他们至少是3个儿子和4个女儿的父母。她去世于1349年8月8日在英国英格兰越可爾多卡斯特享年37岁，埋葬在英国越可爾多卡斯特。

nameMeanings.name: Foliot
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: Italian (Lombardy): variant of   Foglio  . This surname is very rare in Italy.

variants.name: Foglio
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Italian Carmine, Dino, Flavio, Julieta, Sal, Salvatore.
Italian: probably from the Latin personal name Folius (which is embodied in the common placename Fogliano).

nameMeanings.name: Margery
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: The usual medieval vernacular form of   Margaret   (now also commonly spelled   Marjorie  ). This form of the name is preserved in the nursery rhyme ‘See-saw, Margery Daw’.

historicEvents.title: Famine Strikes Europe
historicEvents.description: A famine caused by cold winters and wet summers across Europe caused millions to die due to starvation. Desperation from hunger caused high levels of crime, stampedes in bread lines in London, infanticide, and even cannibalism throughout Europe.

historicEvents.title: First War of Scottish Independence
historicEvents.description: The First War of Scottish Independence began after England invaded Scotland in 1296. The Treaty of Edinburgh was signed in 1328 which declared peace between the two kingdoms and brought the war to an end.

historicEvents.title: The Hundred Years' War
historicEvents.description: The Hundred Years' War between France and England was largely due to the question of legitimate succession to the French crown.

en.lifeSummary: When Margery Foliot was born about 1313, in Mitford, Northumberland, England, her father, Richard Foliot 2nd Lord Foliot, was 30 and her mother, Joan de Braose, was 32. She married Hugh Hastings on 18 May 1327. They were the parents of at least 3 sons and 4 daughters. She died on 8 August 1349, in Doncaster, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom, at the age of 37, and was buried in Doncaster, Yorkshire, England.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Margery Foliot est née environ 1313, à Mitford, Northumberland, Angleterre, son père, Richard Foliot 2nd Lord Foliot, avait 30 ans et sa mère, Joan de Braose, avait 32 ans. Elle a épousé Hugh Hastings le 18 mai 1327. Ils ont eu au moins 3 fils et 4 filles. Elle est décédée le 8 août 1349, à Doncaster, Everwyck, Angleterre, Royaume-Uni, à l’âge de 37 ans, et a été enterrée à Doncaster, Everwyck, Angleterre.

de.lifeSummary: Als Margery Foliot um 1313 in Mitford, Northumberland, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Richard Foliot 2nd Lord Foliot 30 und ihre Mutter Joan de Braose 32. Sie hat am 18. Mai 1327 Hugh Hastings geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 3 Söhne und 4 Töchter. Sie starb am 8. August 1349 im Alter von 37 Jahren in Doncaster, Yorkshire, England, United Kingdom und wurde in Doncaster, Yorkshire, England begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Foliot è nata il circa 1313 nel Mitford, Northumberland, England, sua padre, Richard Foliot 2nd Lord Foliot, aveva 30 anni e sua madre, Joan de Braose, aveva 32 anni. Lei sposato Hugh Hastings il 18 maggio 1327. Erano genitori di almeno 3 figli e 4 figlie. Morì il 8 agosto 1349, nel Doncaster, Yorkshire, Inghilterra, Regno Unito, all'età di 37 anni, e fu sepolta a Doncaster, Yorkshire, England.

ja.lifeSummary: Margery Foliotが約1313年にイギリスノースウンバーランドミトフォードで生まれた時，父Richard Foliot 2nd Lord Foliotは30歳，母Joan de Braoseは32歳であった。1327年5月18日にHugh Hastingsと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも3人の息子と4人の娘の親であった。彼女は1349年8月8日にイギリスイギリスヨークシュアイアドンカスターで37歳で死去し，イギリスヨークシュアイアドンカスターにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Margery Foliot(이)가 대략 1313년 영국 노르스벌랜드 미트퍼드에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Richard Foliot 2nd Lord Foliot(은)는 30세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Joan de Braose(은)는 32세였다. 그녀는 1327년 5월 18일 Hugh Hastings(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 세 명의 아들과 네 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 1349년 8월 8일 영국 잉글랜드 요르크실르 돈카스터에서 37세의 나이로 사망했으며 영국 요르크실르 돈카스터에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Margery Foliot nasceu aproximadamente 1313, em Mitford, Northumberland, Inglaterra, seu pai, Richard Foliot 2nd Lord Foliot, tinha 30 anos e sua mãe, Joan de Braose, tinha 32 anos. Ela casou-se com Hugh Hastings em 18 de maio de 1327. Eles tiveram pelo menos 3 filhos e 4 filhas. Ela faleceu em 8 de agosto de 1349, em Doncaster, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, United Kingdom, com 37 anos, e foi sepultada em Doncaster, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Margery Foliot родилась около 1313 г. в местности митфорд, нортумбирланд, Англия, её отцу по имени Richard Foliot 2nd Lord Foliot было 30 лет, а матери, которую звали Joan de Braose, 32. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Hugh Hastings 18 мая 1327 г. У них было по крайней мере 3 сына и 4 дочери. Она умерла 8 августа 1349 г. в местности донкастир, еркшир, Англия, Великобритания в возрасте 37 лет и была похоронена в местности донкастир, еркшир, Англия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Margery Foliot nació aproximadamente 1313, en Mitford, Northumberland, Inglaterra, su papá, Richard Foliot 2nd Lord Foliot, tenía 30 años y su mamá, Joan de Braose, tenía 32 años. Se casó con Hugh Hastings el 18 de mayo de 1327. Fueron padres de por lo menos 3 hijos y 4 hijas. Murió el 8 de agosto de 1349, en Doncaster, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, Reino Unido, a la edad de 37 años, y fue sepultada en Doncaster, Yorkshire, Inglaterra.
